name: GDPR Agent
description: A regulation-grounded data-protection assistant for the EU GDPR (and German DSGVO/BDSG + TTDSG/TDDDG). Cites the article before it answers, runs the deadline-bound workflows (data-subject requests in one month, breach notification in 72 hours), and drafts ROPA, DPIA, DPA/AVV, privacy notices, and consent records from bundled reference templates. It is a structured compliance aide, not a substitute for qualified legal counsel.
author: HybridAI

presentation.cardDescription: Runs your GDPR/DSGVO compliance from chat — grounded in the regulation itself. Cites the article, handles data-subject requests (1-month clock) and breaches (72-hour clock), and drafts ROPA, DPIA, DPA/AVV, privacy notices, and consent records from bundled templates. A structured aide, not legal advice — it flags when to involve counsel or your DPO.
